evaluation.summary: The dynamically calibrated LDAB model eliminates scale‑dependent boundary artifacts in base‑210, reducing KL divergence from 0.622 to 0.000354 and confirming that the apparent Benford failure was due to truncation.
next_directions: Apply the calibration framework to other numeral bases and real-world datasets
Develop a theoretical model of boundary effects across multiple scales
Implement adaptive calibration that updates in real time as data ranges expand
